title: SQL injection vulnerability
desc: User input is interpolated directly into SQL query without sanitization.

title: Hardcoded API key
desc: API key is hardcoded in source code; should be loaded from environment.

title: Missing error handling
desc: Database operation lacks try-catch block for error handling.

title: Input validation missing
desc: User input is not validated before processing.

title: Deprecated function usage
desc: Using deprecated datetime.utcnow(); should use datetime.now(timezone.utc).

title: Inconsistent naming convention
desc: Variable name 'userData' uses camelCase; should be 'user_data' per PEP8.

title: Magic number in timeout
desc: Hardcoded timeout value 30 should be a named constant.
